macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: Stock Futures Decline on Iran Conflict Concerns
items.summary: US stock futures are lower with S&P 500 down 0.49%, Nasdaq off 0.66%, Dow flat, and Russell 2000 down 0.38%, amid escalating tensions in Iran after a negative response to a US peace plan and Gulf states condemning attacks. Oil prices surged with Brent crude up 3.9% to $106.2/barrel and WTI up 3.61% to $93.58/barrel.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Ethereum Price Drops to $2,073.33 Amid Volatility
items.summary: As of 9 a.m. ET on March 26, 2026, Ethereum (ETH) is priced at $2,073.33, down $97.10 from yesterday despite a $63.43 yearly gain. The cryptocurrency remains highly volatile, with historical surges over 80% and plunges exceeding 60%.

items.title: Bitcoin Falls to $69,438.39, Down Sharply from Yesterday
items.summary: Bitcoin (BTC) trades at $69,438.39 as of 9 a.m. ET on March 26, 2026, a $1,861.29 decrease from yesterday and significantly lower than a year ago. Price movements are driven by investor speculation and market sentiment.

items.title: New Study on 200 Million Blockchain Transactions to Aid US Crypto Regulation
items.summary: Research from Georgia State University analyzing 200 million blockchain transactions reveals that crypto tokens vary significantly, potentially helping Congress resolve ongoing regulatory debates in Washington.

items.title: Tether Announces Big Four Audit and XFX Raises $17M for Stablecoin Services
items.summary: Tether has engaged a Big Four firm for a long-awaited audit, while foreign exchange startup XFX secured $17 million to facilitate business transitions between cash and stablecoins.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: MIT Develops AI System for Smoother Warehouse Robot Traffic
items.summary: MIT researchers have created a hybrid AI system using deep reinforcement learning that boosts warehouse robot throughput by 25% by prioritizing robots and avoiding congestion. The system adapts quickly to new environments, outperforming traditional methods in simulations.[1]

items.title: Salesforce Unveils AI Foundry Initiative for Agentic AI Trends
items.summary: Salesforce AI Research highlighted three key agentic AI trends—simulation environments, agent-to-agent ecosystems, and ambient intelligence—through 2027, launching AI Foundry to advance enterprise general intelligence. This builds on tools like eVerse for agent training via synthetic data and reinforcement learning.[5]

items.title: NC State Hosts Inaugural AI in Biomanufacturing Symposium
items.summary: NC State's BTEC held its first symposium on applied AI in biomanufacturing, discussing AI's role in process efficiency, sustainability, drug discovery, and equipment monitoring with leaders from Eli Lilly and Hyperplane.[4]

items.title: Google's AI Compression Breakthrough Impacts Memory Chip Stocks
items.summary: Google announced a major AI compression advancement that reduces memory needs, causing a sell-off in memory chip stocks as it challenges sector demand.[7]

items.title: Mirage Raises $75M for AI Video Editing App Captions
items.summary: AI video editing startup Mirage secured $75 million in funding to expand its Captions app, which simplifies video creation for users.[3]

items.title: Agile Robots Partners with Google DeepMind on Warehouse AI
items.summary: Agile Robots collaborated with Google DeepMind to integrate intuitive machine learning for robotics, targeting warehouse automation and real-world applications.[3]

items.title: Metromeet 2026 Spotlights AI and Digital Twins in Metrology
items.summary: The Metromeet 2026 conference will focus on AI for automating inspections, predictive quality control, and digital twins for real-time manufacturing optimization.[6]

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Epic Games Announces Layoffs of 1,000 Employees Amid Fortnite Downturn
items.summary: Epic Games is cutting 1,000 jobs, including 200 in Cary, and identifying $500 million in cost savings due to declining Fortnite engagement.

items.title: Xbox Partner Preview Showcase Scheduled for March 26 with Major Third-Party Reveals
items.summary: The Xbox Partner Preview on March 26 at 10AM PT features confirmed updates on Stranger Than Heaven, Stalker 2: Heart of Chornobyl, and The Expanse: Osiris Reborn, plus potential surprises like Persona 4 remake.

items.title: Bungie Confirms Marathon Release in March 2026 for $40 After Delay
items.summary: PlayStation and Bungie announced the extraction shooter Marathon will launch in March 2026 at $40, following a delay from September due to negative alpha feedback.

items.title: Princeton Review Ranks Clark University Top 10 for Game Design Programs
items.summary: Clark University's Becker School of Design & Technology ranked No. 7 undergraduate and No. 8 graduate for game design nationwide by The Princeton Review.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Mastercard to Acquire Stablecoin Startup BVNK for Up to $1.8 Billion
items.summary: US payments giant Mastercard announced a definitive agreement to acquire stablecoin startup BVNK in a deal worth up to $1.8 billion, including $300 million in contingent payments. The acquisition is expected to close before year-end, subject to regulatory review.

items.title: Intercontinental Exchange Acquires Minority Stake in OKX at $25 Billion Valuation
items.summary: ICE has purchased a minority stake in crypto exchange OKX, valuing the company at $25 billion. The investment will enable joint initiatives in market structure design, clearing, risk management, and institutional access to digital assets.

items.title: Borderlands 4 March Patch Delivers 43% Native FPS Performance Improvement
items.summary: A new patch for Borderlands 4 significantly improves PC performance, with native frames per second increasing by 43% according to VideoCardz.com.

items.title: Tech Industry Faces Supply Chain Pressures and Rising Consumer Hardware Costs
items.summary: AI infrastructure demand is straining supply chains across memory, storage, and component markets, causing consumer electronics prices to rise as major players secure billion-dollar supply commitments.
